title: Charred Horizons: Nether Biomes
description: Add new nether biomes with cool stuff!
body:
![Charred Horizons Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121-Mods/CharredHorizons/refs/heads/1.20.1/CharredHorizonsLogo.png)

## Charred Horizons REQUIRES Biolith AND CURIOS

Charred Horizons is a mod that add 3 new nether biomes:
- Desolated Forest, a Bright yellow-orange biome that is home to the sulfuric skeleton.
- decaying valley, a purple-brown biome that is home to the wither skeleton with its wither skeleton sword!
- Fungal Abyss, a green mushroomy biome.

the mod add 2 new mobs, the fiery spider and the sulfuric skeleton :
- the fiery spider drops fiery string; which can be used to make a fiery bow, the fiery bow is a fast bow that always crit when enchanted with flame.
- the sulfuric skeleton drops sulfur and sulfuric bone which can be used to make an upgraded farmland block.

there is also new loot items added to bastion and nether fortress chests.

[![Kinecic Hosting banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121/Branding/master/KineticHosting.png) ](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=540)
